title: Bank of India Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Bank of India Holdings Services is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Bank of India Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bank of India Holdings Services:
Bank of India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bank of India Holdings Services!
